Brindar asesoramiento a otros departamentos sobre cuestiones fiscales, proporcionando orientación sobre el tratamiento fiscal adecuado de transacciones financieras y decisiones comerciales. Trabajar en estrecha colaboración con el equipo financiero, legal y contable para garantizar la coherencia y precisión de la información fiscal. Coordinar y apoyar auditorías fiscales externas e internas, proporcionando documentación y análisis necesarios y respondiendo a consultas de los auditores. Requisitos Título universitario en Contabilidad, Finanzas, Economía u otro campo relacionado. Experiencia previa en contabilidad o análisis fiscal, preferiblemente en un entorno corporativo o en una firma de contabilidad. Conocimiento sólido de las leyes y regulaciones fiscales locales y/o nacionales. Atención al detalle y capacidad para trabajar con precisión bajo presión para cumplir con los plazos establecidos. En Softys fomentamos la inclusión laboral, indícanos si posees algún tipo de discapacidad para estar preparados para poder recibirte. Postula y sé parte de nuestra fibra.

¿ Estás buscando nuevos desafíos y un lugar donde puedas disfrutar de un ambiente cercano mientras aprendes constantemente? ¡Bienvenido a un equipo con un propósito claro: "TRANSFORMAR la vida de las personas siendo el aliado TECNOLÓGICO más confiable"! 🚀 ¡Prepárate y únete a esta aventura! ¿Qué encontrarás? Retos técnicos y personales que te mantendrán en constante crecimiento.🤝 Un equipo conectado, enfocado en tu bienestar físico y mental. Cultura de mejora continua, fresca y colaborativa, con oportunidades de aprendizaje y gente dispuesta a apoyarte. KaizenHub, un programa diseñado para potenciar tus talentos, con feedback, mentorías y coaching a través de Sofka U. ¡Será un reto y un juego a la vez! 🧠🎮 Programas como Happy Kaizen y WeSofka que cuidan tu bienestar físico y emocional. ¿Qué buscamos? Estamos en la búsqueda de un Arquitecto de Soluciones Senior con una sólida formación académica y técnica, idealmente con especialización o maestría en Arquitectura de Software. Buscamos a un líder técnico con más de 5 años de experiencia que domine patrones avanzados como Clean Architecture, Microservicios, DDD y CQRS . El perfil ideal debe ser capaz de diseñar entornos tecnológicos simples pero potentes, utilizando un stack moderno que incluye AWS, Kubernetes, NestJS y React Native . Esta es una oportunidad estratégica para influir directamente en la evolución de nuestra plataforma. No solo diseñarás diagramas; serás el puente que garantice la alineación técnica entre desarrollo, QA, Operaciones y UX, transformando la visión de negocio en soluciones tangibles, escalables y seguras que definan el estándar de la industria. Responsabilidades Diseñar y evaluar soluciones tecnológicas integrales que garanticen un entorno simple, adaptable y escalable. Liderar la implementación de patrones de diseño avanzados (DDD, CQRS) para asegurar la mantenibilidad a largo plazo. Coordinar la alineación técnica entre los equipos de desarrollo, QA, operaciones, UX y partners externos. Definir estrategias de infraestructura y despliegue utilizando Kubernetes, AWS y pipelines de CI/CD automatizados. Garantizar la resiliencia del sistema mediante el diseño de comunicaciones asíncronas con Kafka o RabbitMQ. Supervisar la calidad técnica y el modelado avanzado de datos en entornos SQL y NoSQL. Ejecutar pruebas de concepto (PoC) para validar la viabilidad de nuevas tecnologías y tendencias. Documentar de manera exhaustiva las decisiones arquitectónicas y guiar al equipo en su ejecución técnica. Requisitos Formación: Profesional en Ingeniería de Sistemas, Electrónica o carreras afines, con Especialización o Maestría en Arquitectura de Software (o estudios superiores equivalentes). Experiencia: Trayectoria comprobada de 4 a 6 años como Arquitecto de Soluciones o Líder Técnico Senior, con experiencia liderando equipos multidisciplinarios y proyectos de alta complejidad. Conocimientos Técnicos Patrones de Diseño y Arquitectura: Clean Architecture, Microservicios, DDD, CQRS. Infraestructura y Despliegue: AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD. Frameworks de Desarrollo: NestJS, TypeScript, Angular y React Native. Mensajería y Sistemas Distribuidos: Kafka, RabbitMQ. Automatización y Testing: Cypress, Appium, API Testing. Bases de Datos: Modelado avanzado en SQL y NoSQL. Herramientas de Colaboración: Jira, Confluence. Deseable: Herramientas de UX Insights (Qualtrics, UXCam, Zendesk). ¡ PRESENTATE y sé parte de esta historia! Condiciones Contrato a término indefinido ¡Queremos relaciones a largo plazo y que seas parte de nuestra familia por mucho tiempo! ¿Buscas crecimiento profesional? En Sofka, te ofrecemos un ecosistema de aprendizaje con múltiples herramientas para cerrar brechas y potenciar tus habilidades. ¡Tú decides cómo quieres crecer! 📚

titulo: BIM Modelleur / Programmeur Dynamo, C# en Python
descripcion: SENIOR | BOUWKUNDE EN/OF INSTALLATIETECHNIEK Bloxz onde rsteunt opdrachtgevers in de bouw en installatietechniek met Building Information Modeling, kortweg BIM. Deze duurzame en efficiënte manier van werken creëert één (digitale) versie van de waarheid binnen bouwprojecten. Met lagere faalkosten, optimale samenwerking en kortere bouwtijd als resultaat. Heb je interesse? Bij Bloxz werken BIM Masters. Een hecht team dat alle disciplines aan boord heeft. Onze integraal denkende Bloxz blokes zetten we probleemloos binnen ieder project in. Omdat het BIM vakgebied constant in beweging is, zijn wij altijd op zoek naar mensen die excelleren in BIM. Collega’s met kennis, innovatievermogen, trots en passie voor hun vak. Harde werkers die op kwalitatieve, rendabele wijze vorm geven aan projecten van opdrachtgevers en toekomstige gebruikers. Bloxz is niet alleen het beste adviesbureau van Nederland, maar ook het gaafste. Dat zit hem in onze klanten en projecten. En dat zit hem in de cultuur. Wij geloven namelijk dat werk leuk mag zijn. Het is de enige manier waarop wij kunnen en willen werken. Wie ben jij? Als BIM modelleur (Revit) ben je de linking pin binnen een integraal projectteam. Jouw Autodesk Revit skills heb je vooral nodig in de engineeringsfase van projecten. Je deinst niet terug voor een grote diversiteit aan projecten en een breed speelveld. Behalve creativiteit, passie en drive beschik jij over de nodige installatie- en/of bouwtechnische kennis. Daarnaast heb jij de nieuwsgierigheid naar automatiseren van processen en veel voorkomende handelingen. Hiervoor ontwikkel je zelf scripts en maak je gebruik van Dynamo of zelfs C# en Python. Wij zijn de veranderaars in de bouwsector. Daarom verwachten we van jou dat je ieder project zoekt naar slimmere, betere en efficiëntere mogelijkheden. Als team verhogen we de kennis en expertise van opdrachtgevers en maken we van ieder project een doorslaand succes. Wij Bieden Je Een jong team van BIM Managers, coördinatoren, werkvoorbereiders, BIM modelleurs, trainers, adviseurs. Echte BIM Masters die elkaar uitdagen om constant de beste te zijn. Uitstekende primaire en secundaire arbeidsvoorwaarden Bonusregeling op basis van individuele prestaties Personal coaching, training en opleiding voor jouw persoonlijke ontwikkeling binnen het vakgebied Geïnteresseerd? Heb jij interesse in deze functie bij Bloxz? Dan zien wij graag jouw motivatie met CV tegemoet!

Nos encontramos en la búsqueda de Analista de Procesos que estará encargado identificar, analizar y mejorar los procesos empresariales para maximizar la eficiencia y la productividad. Conocimientos en Gestión por procesos, Técnicas de optimización de procesos y control interno, Sistemas de Gestión Integrados, Gestión del Cambio. Título de tercer nivel en Psicología Organizacional, Recursos Humanos, Administración o afines Experiencia de 2 a 4 años en reclutamiento y selección Manejo de entrevistas por competencias Experiencia gestionando procesos completos de selección Conocimiento de fuentes de reclutamiento y herramientas digitales Deseable experiencia en sector salud o servicios ¿Quiénes somos? Somos la red de centros médicos ambulatorios que acompaña la salud de las personas en su día de forma integral, continua y preventiva. Nuestro Propósito Convertimos la salud en una experiencia humana otra vez. Nuestra Misión Transformamos la relación de las personas con la salud. Para ello construimos una red basada en la prevención como punto de partida y la experiencia del paciente como prioridad en todos los momentos de atención. Nuestra Visión Ser la organización que define como las personas viven la salud.

What we are looking for: - 4+ years of experience in Site Reliability Engineering, Robotics, or Embedded Systems. - Proven expertise in supporting and debugging real-time vehicle systems and Linux environments. - Proficiency in building tools and infrastructure to diagnose and resolve hardware-software issues at scale. - Deep understanding of system design, real-time debugging, and operational reliability. - Hands-on experience with 3D visualization tools and physical test bench environments. - Advanced proficiency in English. How we do make your work (and your life) easier: - 100% remote work (from anywhere). - Excellent compensation in USD or your local currency if preferred - Hardware and software setup for you to work from home. - Flexible hours: create your own schedule. - Paid parental leaves, vacations, and holidays. - Innovative and multicultural work environment: collaborate and learn from the global Top 1% of talent. - Supportive environment with mentorship, promotions, skill development, and diverse growth opportunities. Job Title: MLOps Engineer (Remote) Work Mode: Fully Remote Schedule: Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability) Role Overview: We are looking for software engineers across Latin America to join a paid remote AI training program. In this role, you will review and evaluate AI-generated code, rate AI responses for accuracy and quality, and write coding challenges to help improve AI model performance. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well-suited for software engineers seeking project-based, asynchronous work. No prior AI experience required. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics. Ready to put your coding skills to work on AI? Apply now — interviews begin within days of application.

Job Overview Plan A Technologies is looking for an ET Functional . In this role, you will provide functional expertise across Oracle Fusion modules and support the program through critical testing and validation phases. This role is responsible for ensuring that Oracle Fusion leading practices are applied consistently to drive a successful deployment. Please note: You must have 4+ years of functional experience working across multiple Oracle Fusion modules to be considered for this role. Job Responsibilities Actively support the program through CRP (Conference Room Pilot), SIT (System Integration Testing), and UAT (User Acceptance Testing) phases. Serve as a functional expert to ensure Oracle Fusion leading practices are integrated into the system design and business processes. Review and validate integration builds during SIT and UAT to ensure high quality, cross-module alignment, and overall deployment readiness. Work closely with technical teams to ensure that configurations meet business requirements and industry standards. Experience BS/MS in Computer Science or related engineering field. Proven functional experience working across multiple Oracle Fusion modules. Hands-on experience navigating and supporting CRP, SIT, and UAT cycles within an ERP environment. Deep understanding of standard Oracle Fusion workflows and implementation leading practices. Ability to validate that data flows and integrations between modules are functioning correctly and meet deployment criteria. Strong ability to identify functional gaps and suggest standardized solutions. Ability to work effectively with both technical developers and business stakeholders. Focused on meeting strict project milestones and ensuring "readiness for deployment." Have solid written and verbal English skills. Initiative and drive to do great things. About The Company/Benefits Plan A Technologies is an American software development and technology advisory firm that brings top-tier engineering talent to clients around the world. Our software engineers tackle custom product development projects, staff augmentation, major integrations and upgrades, and much more. The team is far more hands-on than the giant outsourcing shops, but still big enough to handle major enterprise clients. Read more about us here: www.PlanAtechnologies.com . Location: Work From Home 100% of the time, or come in to one of our global offices. Up to you. Great colleagues and an upbeat work environment: You'll join an excellent team of supportive engineers and project managers who work hard but don't ever compete with each other. Benefits: You’ll get a generous vacation schedule, Brand New Laptop, and other goodies. If this sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you!

titulo: Tech Lead (Sanity CMS) - Remote - Latin America
descripcion: About FullStack FullStack is the most transparent IT talent network, connecting highly skilled individuals with top global companies and Silicon Valley startups for remote, on-demand projects. We focus on building a trusted, high-performance network where talent can thrive in a positive, respectful, and supportive environment. By prioritizing transparency, fair opportunities, and professional growth, we empower our engineers to deliver their best work while collaborating with innovative teams worldwide. We’re Most Proud Of Offering life-changing opportunities for talented software professionals across the Americas. Enhancing highly-skilled software development teams of hundreds of the world’s greatest companies. Our 4.2-star rating on GlassDoor. Our client Net Promoter Score of 68, twice the industry average. The Opportunity Join our talent network and connect with U.S. clients for flexible, project-based development work as a Tech Lead (Sanity CMS). You will integrate directly into our client's team and work alongside their existing designers and engineers on a daily basis. What We're Looking For 5+ years of professional full-stack software engineering experience. 3+ years of experience in technical leadership, driving architecture decisions and leading engineering teams through complex technical initiatives. Advanced English is required. Successful completion of a four-year college degree is required. Extensive experience with TypeScript and Node.js in production environments. Proven experience leading large-scale Sanity CMS migration projects, including content modeling, data mapping, transformation, and migration strategies. Extensive hands-on experience with Sanity CMS in production environments, including content schemas, migration tooling, APIs, GROQ, content architecture, and successful end-to-end Sanity migration projects.Strong history of designing and implementing backend services and API-driven architectures. Demonstrated experience working with RESTful APIs and GraphQL. Practical experience building and maintaining scalable distributed systems. Deep experience in modern JavaScript ecosystems, including React and/or Next.js. Solid understanding of headless CMS architectures and content delivery platforms. Track record of designing data migration solutions from legacy platforms to modern content management systems. Experience working with document-based databases and content-centric data structures. Proven experience implementing integrations between enterprise platforms and modern CMS solutions. Comfortable working with cloud platforms and modern deployment workflows. Skilled at identifying technical risks, defining migration strategies, and ensuring data integrity throughout migration projects. Experience collaborating with cross-functional stakeholders, including product, content, and engineering teams. Nice to have experience with Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) or other enterprise CMS platforms such as Contentful, Strapi, or WordPress (Sanity experience remains strictly preferred/required). Ability to work through new and difficult issues and contribute to libraries as needed. Ability to create and maintain continuous integration and delivery of applications. Forensic attention to detail. A positive mindset and a can-do attitude. Experience working on Agile/Scrum teams. Meaningful experience working on large, complex systems. Ability to take extreme ownership over your work. Every day is a challenge to ensure you are performing to the expectations you and your team have agreed upon. Ability to identify with the goals of FullStack's clients and dedicate yourself to delivering on the commitments you and your team make to them. Nice To Have We’re Seeking Engineers Who Are AI-enthusiastic In Their Workflow. Professional Experience Or Personal Project Work With The Following Is a Significant Plus Cursor, Windsurf, or Google Antigravity. Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex, or Copilot CLI. What We Offer Competitive pay. 100% remote work. The ability to work with leading startups and Fortune 500 companies. Continuing education opportunities. Opportunity to grow and expand your career. Our talent network is committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and accessible environment where IT professionals can find opportunities that match their skills. We welcome individuals of all races, religions, genders, sexual orientations, national origins, abilities, and experiences. Our focus is on connecting talent with projects based on qualifications, ensuring a fair and transparent process that values diverse perspectives and global collaboration. descripcion: About FullStack FullStack is the most transparent IT talent network, connecting highly skilled individuals with top global companies and Silicon Valley startups for remote, on-demand projects. By prioritizing transparency, fair opportunities, and professional growth, we empower our engineers to deliver their best work while collaborating with innovative teams worldwide. We’re Most Proud Of Offering life-changing opportunities for talented software professionals across the Americas. Enhancing highly-skilled software development teams of hundreds of the world’s greatest companies. Our 4.2-star rating on GlassDoor. Our client Net Promoter Score of 68, twice the industry average. The Opportunity Join our talent network and connect with U.S. clients for flexible, project-based development work as an Agentic Software Engineer (Google Antigravity). You will integrate directly into our client's team and work alongside their existing designers and engineers on a daily basis. What We're Looking For 5+ years of professional software development experience with a deep understanding of full-stack architectures (e.g., Java, Python, C#, React, Node, etc.). Deep experience using Google Antigravity as a primary development environment to coordinate AI-driven implementation across large, multi-file systems while maintaining architectural oversight. Experience delivering production software where AI systems generate the majority of implementation code. Strong context engineering skills, including structuring codebases, specifications, and documentation to produce reliable, context-efficient AI output. Ability to translate complex product requirements into machine-executable, AI-friendly specifications. Experience designing AI-first development workflows from specification through deployment. Ability to systematically improve AI-generated output through structured iteration and feedback loops. Comfort working across multiple stacks, using AI to deliver high-quality, production-ready systems. Experience operating across frontend, backend, and infrastructure in AI-accelerated environments. Disciplined human-in-the-loop review practices, with risk-adjusted validation for high-impact or safety-critical flows. Strong curiosity and initiative in evaluating and adopting emerging AI-native engineering practices. Advanced understanding of Agile methodologies and Lean principles and participation in team ceremonies as well as asynchronous work. Advanced English is required. Successful completion of a four-year college degree is required. A positive mindset and a can-do attitude. Ability to identify with the goals of FullStack's clients and dedicate yourself to delivering on commitments. Ability to consistently work 40 hours per week. What We Offer Competitive pay. 100% remote work. The ability to work with leading startups and Fortune 500 companies. Continuing education opportunities. Opportunity to grow and expand your career. Our talent network is committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and accessible environment where IT professionals can find opportunities that match their skills. We welcome individuals of all races, religions, genders, sexual orientations, national origins, abilities, and experiences. Our focus is on connecting talent with projects based on qualifications, ensuring a fair and transparent process that values diverse perspectives and global collaboration. Learn more about our Applicants Privacy Notice.

Ejecutar controles de calidad en las líneas de producción, verificando el cumplimiento de los parámetros establecidos para cada proceso. Realizar inspecciones y evaluaciones físicas de materias primas, productos en proceso y productos terminados para asegurar su conformidad con las especificaciones técnicas. Gestionar el muestreo, identificación, almacenamiento y trazabilidad de muestras de retención de producto terminado. Monitorear el cumplimiento de las condiciones de orden, limpieza e higiene en las áreas operativas, promoviendo las buenas prácticas de manufactura. Detectar y reportar oportunamente desviaciones de calidad, no conformidades o riesgos que puedan afectar la inocuidad y desempeño del producto. Coordinar la toma y preparación de muestras destinadas a análisis bromatológicos, microbiológicos y toxicológicos realizados por laboratorios internos o externos. Elaborar reportes e indicadores de gestión relacionados con controles de calidad, hallazgos y novedades identificadas durante la operación. Verificar el correcto almacenamiento y la adecuada rotación de materias primas y productos terminados, garantizando el cumplimiento de criterios de trazabilidad y conservación. Inspeccionar productos devueltos o retenidos, documentando resultados y apoyando la definición de acciones correctivas. Participar en la atención de auditorías, visitas técnicas y reclamos relacionados con la calidad de los productos, generando los informes correspondientes. Colaborar en la elaboración, actualización y mejora continua de procedimientos, instructivos operativos y fichas técnicas de producto. Realizar inspecciones a vehículos y unidades de transporte para verificar el cumplimiento de las condiciones requeridas para el despacho seguro de productos terminados. Requisitos Formación académica Estudios Superiores culminados en Ing. en Alimentos, Agroindustrial o carreras afines. Conocimientos en Normas BPM, HACCP, Global Gap, Buenas prácticas de Almacenamiento, Procesos de Auditorías. Experiencia Mínimo de 1 a 3 años en cargos o funciones similares. Beneficios Uniformes Subsidio de alimentación. Transporte/Parqueo Descuentos en la compra de productos de la empresa. Subsidio en seguro médico para colaborador y familiares. Afiliación a la Cooperativa Agrifondos ahorros y créditos a tasas preferenciales. Tenemos la visión de consolidar al Grupo Corporativo en todo el territorio ecuatoriano, enfocando nuestro futuro en el cliente como base del éxito del negocio. Con esta premisa, cumplimos con la misión de ofrecer soluciones integrales a través de la provisión de insumos de alta calidad gracias a nuestra filosofía de servicio permanente. En AGRIPAC valoramos el talento y creemos en la igualdad de oportunidades, donde todas las personas tienen las mismas posibilidades de crecimiento y desarrollo.

Somos una compañía comercializadora de bebidas y alimentos con 137 años de experiencia y operaciones en Centroamérica, el Caribe y Sudamérica. Contamos con el portafolio de productos más grande de la región y trabajamos junto a nuestros socios estratégicos Pepsico, Ambev y Beliv ofreciendo soluciones innovadoras a nuestros clientes. En CBC sabemos construir vínculos sólidos y duraderos. Sabemos escuchar a los consumidores para entender sus necesidades y ofrecerles las mejores marcas en las distintas ocasiones de consumo. Llevamos sabor y frescura al mundo con la ambición de convertirnos en una compañía multicategoría que siga expandiendo sus horizontes. Lo hacemos con el entusiasmo de ver sonreír a nuestro equipo, a los nuestros y a quienes disfrutan lo que hacemos. Nuestra cultura y energía transformadora tienen a la pasión como el motor que nos impulsa a ser mejores y a conquistar nuevos desafíos. Trabajamos con el disfrute de hacer juntos lo imposible. Descripción del empleo Auditar el cumplimiento de los parámetros de calidad e inocuidad en todas las etapas del proceso productivo, asegurando que el producto terminado cumpla con los estándares corporativos, normativas nacionales y requerimientos del cliente, así como gestionar el producto no conforme y emitir reportes de hallazgos para toma de decisiones y mejora continua. Auditar el cumplimiento de especificaciones de calidad e inocuidad en cada fase del proceso de producción (agua, jarabes, llenado, codificación, etiquetado, empaque, etc.) Verificar y registrar parámetros fisicoquímicos, sensoriales y de inocuidad en arranques y durante el proceso en curso según los métodos analíticos definidos y cumplimiento del plan de muestreo. Gestionar producto no conforme según protocolo, reteniendo, documentando y gestionando hallazgos. Requisitos Tercer nivel en Ing. Química, Químico y Farmacia, Ing. Agroindustrial, Ing. Alimentos, Ing. Agroindustrial, Tecnología de Alimentos y afines. Mínimo 2 años en posiciones similares rocesos de manufactura de bebidas: jarabes, embotellado, codificación, empaque Métodos de análisis fisicoquímico y sensorial de producto en proceso y terminado y BPL Manejo de producto no conforme Normativas de calidad e inocuidad HACCP, BPM, FSSC22000 Información adicional La misión de Grupo Mariposa es fomentar el crecimiento y la sostenibilidad dentro de la industria global de alimentos y bebidas. Estamos comprometidos con la excelencia a través de una gestión disciplinada, prácticas innovadoras y una cultura dinámica que acepta el cambio.

Job Description Job Title: Spanish Quality Assurance Lead Job Type: Contract Location: Remote About This Role In this hourly, remote contractor role, you will work as a Spanish Quality Assurance Lead to oversee quality, consistency, and trainer performance across Spanish AI training projects. You will review AI-generated Spanish content and trainer/QA work, evaluate output quality against project guidelines, provide precise written feedback, and ensure that all contributors follow the expected quality standards. You will assess work for accuracy, fluency, grammar, spelling, tone, cultural appropriateness, meaning preservation, instruction-following, formatting, and adherence to project-specific rubrics. You will spot recurring quality issues, communicate updates to trainers and QAs, support onboarding, maintain documentation, and help activate contributors who are not working consistently. This role requires strong Spanish and English skills, excellent attention to detail, structured communication, and the ability to manage quality workflows across remote teams. This role is a fast-growing AI Data Services company delivering training data for many of the world’s largest AI companies and foundation-model labs. Your Spanish quality leadership will directly help improve the world’s premier AI models by ensuring that Spanish training data is natural, accurate, culturally appropriate, well-documented, and aligned with client expectations. Important: There is no immediate project for this role; however, if qualified, you will be among the first experts we reach out to when relevant opportunities arise. This will also provide you with access to future projects available through our expert network. Your profile Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Spanish, Linguistics, Translation, Communications, Journalism, English, Education, Quality Assurance, or a relevant domain/related field. Native or near-native Spanish proficiency with strong reading and writing skills. Strong grasp of the English language to follow project guidelines, communicate with teams, and provide clear feedback in English. 3+ years of professional experience in Spanish writing, editing, translation, localization, content QA, AI training, education, annotation, or related language-review workflows. Strong understanding of Spanish grammar, spelling conventions, punctuation, accents, tone, register, formal/informal usage, and cultural context. Comfortable handling Latin American Spanish and/or European Spanish, including vocabulary, voseo/tuteo/ustedeo usage, localization expectations, and audience adaptation. Candidates should specify which variant(s) they can support. Ability to evaluate Spanish content against detailed rubrics and identify issues such as mistranslation, literal phrasing, unnatural tone, incorrect register, missing accents, hallucinated claims, ambiguity, or inconsistent terminology. Experience leading or supporting remote teams of trainers, annotators, reviewers, editors, or QAs is strongly preferred. Comfortable working in fast-moving remote environments using tools such as Discord, Google Sheets, Google Docs, trackers, dashboards, and project management systems. Highly detail-oriented and organized, with the ability to maintain style guides, FAQs, trackers, onboarding materials, honeypots, and other quality documentation. Experience with AI training, data annotation, large language models, prompt/response evaluation, or rubric-based LLM QA is a strong plus. Key responsibilities Quality monitoring: Spot-check Spanish items, identify quality issues, provide ongoing feedback through DMs, and escalate recurring or critical issues. Trainer and QA communication: Update trainers and QAs on Discord about new item guidelines, project changes, workflow updates, and quality expectations. Question handling: Respond to trainer/QA questions clearly and promptly, especially around Spanish wording, grammar, tone, register, translation fidelity, cultural context, terminology, and Latin American vs European Spanish usage differences. Trainer/QA activation management: DM contributors who are inactive or not working, encourage activation, track follow-ups, and flag availability issues when needed. Documentation: Create and maintain Spanish project documentation, including style guides, trackers, FAQs, quality notes, examples, honeypots, and onboarding materials. Onboarding and training: Schedule and run onboarding/training calls with trainers and QAs to explain project expectations, workflows, rubrics, quality standards, and Spanish-specific style requirements. Quality alignment: Ensure all trainers and QAs apply Spanish language guidelines consistently and understand updates as projects evolve. Process improvement: Identify recurring quality gaps, propose workflow improvements, and help build scalable QA processes for Spanish-language projects.

MISIÓN DEL CARGO Garantizar la calidad y funcionalidad de los productos tecnológicos mediante la ejecución sistemática de pruebas manuales, identificación de defectos y validación de que las soluciones cumplen con los requisitos establecidos, contribuyendo a la mejora continua del software en entornos bancarios de alta criticidad. RESPONSABILIDADES Diseño y ejecución de pruebas funcionales, de regresión, de integración y de rendimiento. Elaboración de casos de prueba, matrices de prueba y escenarios de validación. Documentación de resultados, registro y seguimiento de defectos e incidencias. Validación de aplicaciones, servicios y APIs en ambientes de desarrollo y pruebas. Ejecución de pruebas básicas de seguridad y cifrado en cumplimiento normativo bancario. Coordinación con equipos de desarrollo y usuarios funcionales para resolución de defectos. Aplicación de metodologías BDD y ATDD en el diseño de escenarios de prueba. Uso de herramientas de gestión de pruebas e incidencias (Jira u otras). Trabajo bajo metodologías ágiles (Scrum/Kanban) coordinado con equipos internos del banco. REQUISITOS INDISPENSABLES Título universitario: Ingeniería en Sistemas, Software, Computación, Telecomunicaciones o afines. 2 a 4 años de experiencia en roles de QA o testing de software. Experiencia comprobada en pruebas funcionales y de regresión en entornos empresariales. Conocimiento en metodologías de pruebas: ISTQB, BDD, ATDD (certificación ISTQB valorada). Manejo de herramientas de pruebas de APIs: Postman u otras equivalentes. Conocimiento en lenguajes de scripting básico-intermedio: VB.NET, C#, Python o JavaScript. Manejo de bases de datos SQL: consultas básicas para validación de datos. Manejo de JSON y XML para validación de servicios e intercambio de datos. Control de versiones con Git / GitHub / Azure DevOps. Manejo de herramientas de gestión de pruebas: Jira, Zephyr, Xray u otras. Conocimiento básico de prácticas CI/CD y su relación con el ciclo de pruebas. CONOCIMIENTOS ADICIONALES (DESEABLES) Certificación ISTQB Foundation o superior. Conocimiento básico en automatización de pruebas: Selenium, Cucumber, TestNG u otras. Experiencia con frameworks de pruebas: TestSigma, JUnit u otros equivalentes. Nociones de pruebas móviles con Appium. Conocimiento básico de seguridad en aplicaciones y cumplimiento normativo. Uso de Power BI y SharePoint (nivel intermedio). Inglés técnico (lectura de documentación y especificaciones). Experiencia en sector financiero o bancario. Conocimientos básicos de ISO 9001 (Gestión de Calidad). COMPETENCIAS Pensamiento analítico Atención al detalle Comunicación efectiva Trabajo en equipo Trabajo bajo presión Orientación a resultados Adaptabilidad Resolución de problemas Proactividad Empatía y orientación al cliente CONDICIONES Trabajo 100% presencial en Guayaquil. Proyecto estratégico de alta criticidad en institución financiera de primer nivel. Equipamiento provisto por la empresa. PROCESO DE SELECCIÓN 1\. Entrevista inicial (validación de experiencia y perfil). 2\. Evaluación técnica obligatoria. 3\. Entrevista técnica final con cliente.

Location: Ecuador (remote) Position type: Contract Benefits: + 100% Remote + Office equipment provided by Deft + Unlimited sick days + Ecuadorian holidays. Job Description: We are looking for talented, driven individuals in Quito, Ecuador, to join our team. The right candidate would have an aptitude for software quality assurance and the attitude to jump in and learn a new platform. Job Title: Spanish Language Expert Job Type: Contract Location: Remote Job Summary: As a Spanish Language Expert, you'll apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. Your Profile Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Spanish, Linguistics, Translation, Communications, Journalism, English, Education, Quality Assurance, or a relevant domain/related field. Native or near-native Spanish proficiency with strong reading and writing skills. Strong grasp of the English language to follow project guidelines, communicate with teams, and provide clear feedback in English. 3+ years of professional experience in Spanish writing, editing, translation, localization, content QA, AI training, education, annotation, or related language-review workflows. Strong understanding of Spanish grammar, spelling conventions, punctuation, accents, tone, register, formal/informal usage, and cultural context. Comfortable handling Latin American Spanish and/or European Spanish, including vocabulary, voseo/tuteo/ustedeo usage, localization expectations, and audience adaptation. Candidates should specify which variant(s) they can support. Ability to evaluate Spanish content against detailed rubrics and identify issues such as mistranslation, literal phrasing, unnatural tone, incorrect register, missing accents, hallucinated claims, ambiguity, or inconsistent terminology. Experience leading or supporting remote teams of trainers, annotators, reviewers, editors, or QAs is strongly preferred. Comfortable working in fast-moving remote environments using tools such as Discord, Google Sheets, Google Docs, trackers, dashboards, and project management systems. Highly detail-oriented and organized, with the ability to maintain style guides, FAQs, trackers, onboarding materials, honeypots, and other quality documentation. Experience with AI training, data annotation, large language models, prompt/response evaluation, or rubric-based LLM QA is a strong plus. Key Responsibilities Quality monitoring: Spot-check Spanish items, identify quality issues, provide ongoing feedback through DMs, and escalate recurring or critical issues. Trainer and QA communication: Update trainers and QAs on Discord about new item guidelines, project changes, workflow updates, and quality expectations. Question handling: Respond to trainer/QA questions clearly and promptly, especially around Spanish wording, grammar, tone, register, translation fidelity, cultural context, terminology, and Latin American vs European Spanish usage differences. Trainer/QA activation management: DM contributors who are inactive or not working, encourage activation, track follow-ups, and flag availability issues when needed. Documentation: Create and maintain Spanish project documentation, including style guides, trackers, FAQs, quality notes, examples, honeypots, and onboarding materials. Onboarding and training: Schedule and run onboarding/training calls with trainers and QAs to explain project expectations, workflows, rubrics, quality standards, and Spanish-specific style requirements. Quality alignment: Ensure all trainers and QAs apply Spanish language guidelines consistently and understand updates as projects evolve. Process improvement: Identify recurring quality gaps, propose workflow improvements, and help build scalable QA processes for Spanish-language projects.

TripleTen is a service that empowers people, regardless of their prior experience, to embark on the exciting and challenging journey of mastering tech professions. Our bootcamps focus on training students in Data Analytics, Data Science, Web Development, Quality Assurance (QA) Engineering, and UX/UI Design — in an accessible and practical way, supporting them until they successfully thrive in a new career. 🚀 Our mission is to ensure that every student has the opportunity to successfully master a new profession, find their purpose, and become a valuable member of the tech industry. What is our goal? We are continuously looking for experienced Cybersecurity professionals who want to support and guide our students on their path to becoming professional developers. This is a full-time teaching role with an expectation of 40 hours per week . The schedule can be flexible, but you must be consistently available to support students throughout their learning journey. How to apply? Apply here. We review applications on a rolling basis, and candidates whose profiles align with the role will be invited to complete a digital interview, and complete a short technical test task. If a vacancy is available, we will assign it to you right away; otherwise, we will keep your profile and completed task on file for future opportunities. 📌 Please submit your CV in English. What you will do: Host regular live Q&A sessions to help students unblock and progress confidently Offer personalized support through 1:1 video calls to answer questions and guide assignments Occasionally respond to student questions via direct messages Lead live lessons on core program topics and industry-relevant skills Share your professional insights and best practices to support the learning community Review student projects and provide feedback based on program standards Write clear, actionable feedback to help students improve and meet expectations Support students in text by explaining concepts, troubleshooting code, and clarifying project or review questions Requirements: We require at least 3 years of hands-on experience in cybersecurity, with knowledge in: Networking & Architecture: Understanding of flat vs. segmented networks, DMZs, and blast radius reduction. Authentication & Access Abuse: Ability to identify risks related to privileged access, RDP usage, and mass data exports. Incident Analysis: Experience investigating failed logins, password resets, and administrative account creation using MITRE ATT&CK tactics. Log Analysis: Ability to analyze logs and identify suspicious patterns. Python Programming: Ability to develop scripts for log processing, occurrence counting, and extracting relevant information. Ability to explain complex topics clearly to beginners. Patience and empathy toward students who are new to cybersecurity. Availability to dedicate between 12 and 20 hours per week to the project, with a flexible schedule that may occasionally include weekends. B1 English level and strong Spanish proficiency. Ability to answer beginner-level questions with patience and practical examples. Nice to have: Previous teaching experience. Experience guiding beginners one-on-one with clear, step-by-step instruction. What we can offer you: Training in mentoring and communication techniques. The opportunity to teach while continuing your main job. The chance to share knowledge and experience with developers within our community. Cross-cultural collaboration experience through mentoring and webinar facilitation. Remote collaboration with a schedule that is convenient for both you and the team. We do not focus on micromanagement. A comfortable digital office environment. We use modern digital tools such as Miro, Notion, Zoom, and others to ensure smooth collaboration. A diverse and close-knit team distributed across the U.S. and Latin America.

Trainer/QA activation management: DM contributors who are inactive or not working, encourage activation, track follow-ups, and flag availability issues when needed. Documentation: Create and maintain Spanish project documentation, including style guides, trackers, FAQs, quality notes, examples, honeypots, and onboarding materials. Onboarding and training: Schedule and run onboarding/training calls with trainers and QAs to explain project expectations, workflows, rubrics, quality standards, and Spanish-specific style requirements. Quality alignment: Ensure all trainers and QAs apply Spanish language guidelines consistently and understand updates as projects evolve. Process improvement: Identify recurring quality gaps, propose workflow improvements, and help build scalable QA processes for Spanish-language projects.

About You You are a QA Mobile Automation Engineer with deep expertise in mobile automation, API automation, and CI/CD integration. You are passionate about building scalable automation frameworks, improving testing efficiency, and driving quality initiatives across complex applications. You enjoy solving technical challenges, mentoring team members, and establishing automation best practices that improve software quality and delivery speed. You are comfortable acting as a technical leader, collaborating with stakeholders, and influencing quality decisions throughout the software development lifecycle. Experience within banking and mobile banking environments is highly valued. You Bring to Applaudo the Following Competencies: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related field is desired, or equivalent professional experience. 5+ years of experience in QA Automation. Strong experience automating APIs using Playwright. Strong experience automating mobile applications using WebDriverIO. Strong JavaScript and TypeScript skills. Experience testing REST APIs, authentication flows, and token management. Experience integrating automated testing into CI/CD pipelines. Experience using Git and modern software development practices. Experience leading QA automation initiatives and promoting automation best practices. Experience with mobile banking applications is highly preferred. Strong communication, collaboration, and technical leadership skills. Nice-to-Have: Experience with k6 performance testing. Banking certifications. Mobile testing certifications. You will be accountable for the following responsibilities: Design, build, and maintain scalable automation frameworks. Automate API, mobile, and end-to-end testing scenarios. Build and maintain mobile automation suites using established frameworks and best practices. Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines to support continuous delivery. Analyze automation results, identify risks, and communicate findings to stakeholders. Drive quality initiatives across the project and promote automation excellence. Establish QA automation best practices and continuous improvement processes. Mentor and support team members through technical guidance and knowledge sharing. Collaborate with Engineering, Product, and business stakeholders to ensure software quality. Act as a technical leader and trusted advisor for QA Automation initiatives. Qualifications 5+ years of experience in QA Automation. Strong experience with Playwright and WebDriverIO. Strong JavaScript and TypeScript skills. Experience integrating automation into CI/CD pipelines. Mobile Banking experience is highly desirable. Additional Information About Us We Are Engineered Different. At Applaudo, talented people design, build, and scale meaningful, AI-powered solutions that create real business impact. As an AI-native organization, we collaborate across design, development, cloud, data, and artificial intelligence to turn ideas into scalable products that transform how companies operate, make decisions, and grow. We are building a high-performance culture grounded in five values: Empowering Excellence, Collaborative Teamwork, Unsolicited Respect, Consistent Transparency, and Efficient Communication . These define how we work, how we support one another, and how we hold ourselves accountable. Applaudo is a place for people who want to learn fast, take ownership, and work alongside strong teams they are proud to belong to. Joining us means being part of an organization that is evolving intentionally, investing in modern ways of working, and leading AI-native transformation at scale.

Description TripleTen is a service that empowers people, regardless of their prior experience, to embark on the exciting and challenging journey of mastering tech professions. Our bootcamps focus on training students in Data Analytics, Data Science, Web Development, Quality Assurance (QA) Engineering, and UX/UI Design — in an accessible and practical way, supporting them until they successfully thrive in a new career. 🚀 Our mission is to ensure that every student has the opportunity to successfully master a new profession, find their purpose, and become a valuable member of the tech industry. What is our goal? We are continuously looking for experienced AI Automation professionals who want to support and guide our students on their path to becoming professional developers. This is a full-time teaching role with an expectation of 40 hours per week . The schedule can be flexible, but you must be consistently available to support students throughout their learning journey. How to apply? Apply here. We review applications on a rolling basis, and candidates whose profiles align with the role will be invited to complete a digital interview, and complete a short technical test task. If a vacancy is available, we will assign it to you right away; otherwise, we will keep your profile and completed task on file for future opportunities. 📌 Please submit your CV in English. What You Will Do Mentor students through 1:1 video calls, addressing a wide range of questions, clarifying complex concepts, and helping students navigate their assignments. Support students in live “Q&A style” sessions, where they can walk in with immediate questions. Host webinars and other group educational events, covering program content, extracurricular skills, and industry knowledge. You may also participate in non-educational sessions such as New Student Orientation. Review and assess student projects in alignment with program standards and best practices, providing clear, constructive feedback. Engage with students on the TripleTen Hub, offering written guidance and supporting ongoing communication. Share your professional expertise and best industry practices to equip students with relevant insights and strategies for their careers. Create and curate educational resources within the TripleTen Hub to enhance student learning and make knowledge more accessible. Foster a collaborative learning community by encouraging student interaction, building a sense of belonging, and cultivating a network of shared knowledge and mutual support. Host Mock Technical Interviews providing constructive feedback on both their technical responses and interview skills. Requirements 3+ years of hands-on experience identifying opportunities for automation and designing solutions to optimize business processes—ideally within the marketing, tech, or customer success. Solid understanding of business process improvement, with a working knowledge of how AI and automation can streamline workflows and boost efficiency. Comfortable providing constructive and actionable feedback to junior professionals or students. Ideally experienced in presentation coaching, mentoring, or guiding others in their professional development. Clear and confident communicator who can explain technical or complex concepts in a simple and engaging way. Nice To Have Experience working directly with stakeholders or clients to identify needs, pitch solutions, and drive adoption of automation tools. What We Can Offer You Training in mentoring and communication techniques. The opportunity to teach while continuing your main job. The chance to share knowledge and experience with developers within our community. Cross-cultural collaboration experience through mentoring and webinar facilitation. Remote collaboration with a schedule that is convenient for both you and the team. We do not focus on micromanagement. A comfortable digital office environment. We use modern digital tools such as Miro, Notion, Zoom, and others to ensure smooth collaboration. A diverse and close-knit team distributed across the U.S. and Latin America.

Job Description Scientist Objective Working as customer support scientist in OEM business Technology team, to develop and maintain cost effective, high quality products for our customers which can be manufactured efficiently in Operations by understanding our formulating practices, customer specifications and test methods, working with Operations to transfer products smoothly into production and following our quality procedures to ensure continuous improvement. Core Responsibilities Develop/Optimize recipes for products following APQP process. This includes preparation of a lab sample and sufficient testing to demonstrate fulfillment of customer specifications, including color. Recipes are also to be developed to be cost effective, meeting our customers’ requirements while using low cost materials. A scientist must understand how recipe cost impacts the profitability of our company. Work with operation team and other function to ensure new/modified product alignment (scale up) into production. Work with application team to develop application line simulation parameters to ensure that line trials and product introductions are right first time. Communicate with account teams to ensure that all project team members are fully up-to-date with technical progress on projects. When relevant, a scientist is responsible for finding suitable rework routes to support non-productive inventory reduction with product quality control. Keep test specifications and test methods up to date, develop new specifications and methods as required. Aim to minimize the amount of testing needed to meet our customers’ requirements. Analyze and document results, prepare technical reports, examinations and summaries Ensure all project documentation is completed properly and in full and available for any internal or external quality audits. Attend line trials of new product launches at customer sites. Lead or take active role in problem solving of customer issues using appropriate methodology, e.g. 8D. Understand the process overview. Understand specific hazards on safety, health, environment related to the process. Understand the operation procedure. Safety practices related to work tasks. Key Job Requirements 3 years coating experience or above, ideally with OEM coating development experience Knowledge & Skills (functional competences and capabilities): B.S. in Chemistry related or above, or equivalent coating research / development experience Project management and problem-solving skill Good computer skills including office, database, and statistics Good verbal and written of English language preferred Team work and collaboration is important Our Company Axalta has remained at the forefront of the coatings industry by continually investing in innovative solutions. We engineer technologies that protect customers’ products – whether they are battling heat, light, corrosion, abrasion, moisture, or chemicals – and add dimension and beauty with colorful finishes. We have a vast and ever-evolving portfolio of brands primed to play an important part in everything from modernizing infrastructure around the world to enabling the next generation of electric and autonomous vehicles. Axalta operates its business in two segments: Performance Coatings and Mobility Coatings, which serve four end markets, including Refinish, Industrial, Light Vehicle and Commercial Vehicle, across North America, EMEA, Latin America and Asia-Pacific. Our diverse global footprint allows us to deliver solutions in over 140+ countries and coat 30 million vehicles per year. We’ve recently set an exciting 2040 carbon neutrality goal, in addition to 10 other sustainability initiatives, and we take pride in working with our customers to optimize their businesses and achieve their goals.

OBJETIVO DEL PUESTO Brindar apoyo operativo y administrativo al área de calidad mediante el seguimiento de controles, registros y verificaciones de procesos, asegurando el cumplimiento de normas de inocuidad, Buenas Prácticas de Manufactura (BPM) y estándares de calidad establecidos para garantizar productos seguros y confiables para el consumidor final. FUNCIONES Verificar el cumplimiento de Buenas Prácticas de Manufactura (BPM) en planta. Registrar controles de temperatura en procesos, almacenamiento y transporte. Apoyar en la supervisión de limpieza y desinfección (POES). Realizar inspecciones visuales de calidad en materia prima y producto terminado. Completar y archivar formatos y registros del sistema de calidad. Dar seguimiento a desviaciones detectadas en procesos. Apoyar en auditorías internas y externas. Verificar el correcto uso de uniforme y normas higiénico-sanitarias del personal. Coordinar toma de muestras microbiológicas y fisicoquímicas. Apoyar en capacitaciones relacionadas con inocuidad y calidad. Mantener actualizada la documentación del área. Ejecutar actividades administrativas relacionadas con calidad. Requisitos Formación Tercer nivel en Alimentos, Agroindustria, Biotecnología, Calidad o carreras afines. Conocimientos BPM, inocuidad alimentaria o calidad, microsoft Excel básico, manejo de registros y documentación, control de temperaturas y procesos Experiencia 1 año en áreas de calidad, producción o control de procesos. Beneficios Alimentación Beneficios de ley Beneficios empresariales MISIÓN Satisfacer las necesidades de los clientes con productos de calidad al mejor precio y con el mejor servicio; generando fuentes de trabajo, crecimiento de nuestros colaboradores y proveedores. VISIÓN Ser la mejor alternativa de compra en autoservicios, ubicados estratégicamente a nivel nacional.

titulo: ASISTENTE DE CONTROL DE CALIDAD (TELECOMUNICACIONES)  - QUITO
descripcion: 🚀 ¡Únete a Alfanet y sé parte de la empresa que conecta el futuro! ¿Te apasiona la calidad, el análisis de procesos y la mejora continua? 📊✨ En Alfanet buscamos un Asistente de Control de Calidad que contribuya a garantizar la excelencia operativa en nuestras áreas de atención al cliente, ventas, cobranzas y operaciones técnicas. Si eres una persona analítica, proactiva y orientada a resultados, ¡esta oportunidad es para ti! 💙💛 🎯 ¿Cuáles serán tus principales retos? ✅ Monitorear y auditar procesos para asegurar el cumplimiento de estándares de calidad. ✅ Analizar indicadores y elaborar reportes de gestión para identificar oportunidades de mejora. ✅ Dar seguimiento a planes de acción y correcciones que impulsen la mejora continua de los procesos. ✅ Verificar el cumplimiento de políticas, procedimientos y buenas prácticas organizacionales. ✅ Generar retroalimentación oportuna para fortalecer el desempeño de las diferentes áreas. Requisitos 📋 Requisitos 🎓 Título de tercer nivel en Redes y Telecomunicaciones, Sistemas, afines. 💼 Experiencia mínima de 1 año en cargos similares, en empresas de telecomunicaciones. 🧠 Conocimientos en Monitoreo de interacciones. Gestión y mejora de procesos. Sistemas de Gestión de Calidad. Fiscalización de la parte técnica Tendido de fibra Asistencia técnica de instalaciones 🌟 Competencias que buscamos Capacidad analítica. Atención al detalle. Comunicación efectiva. Orientación a resultados. Trabajo en equipo. Proactividad. Beneficios 🎉 Día libre por tu cumpleaños. 💰 Bono de alimentación y transporte desde el primer mes. 🩺 Seguro médico y de accidentes cubierto al 100%. 📚 Capacitaciones continuas para tu crecimiento. Se constituyó el 25 junio del año 2012 con la finalidad de brindar el servicio de conectividad a la red de Internet banda ancha. Bajo el nombre comercial de ALFANET ha logrado posicionarse como referente a nivel regional en la provisión de conexión a Internet y servicios de valor agregado en Telecomunicaciones. Contamos con tecnología de última generación y personal técnico calificado, como resultado de diversos convenios y alianzas estratégicas con nuestros proveedores; todo esto a disposición de los diferentes requerimientos de nuestros clientes.

Descripción de la empresa Somos una compañía comercializadora de bebidas y alimentos con 137 años de experiencia y operaciones en Centroamérica, el Caribe y Sudamérica. Contamos con el portafolio de productos más grande de la región y trabajamos junto a nuestros socios estratégicos En CBC sabemos construir vínculos sólidos y duraderos. Sabemos escuchar a los consumidores para entender sus necesidades y ofrecerles las mejores marcas en las distintas ocasiones de consumo. Llevamos sabor y frescura al mundo con la ambición de convertirnos en una compañía multicategoría que siga expandiendo sus horizontes. Lo hacemos con el entusiasmo de ver sonreír a nuestro equipo, a los nuestros y a quienes disfrutan lo que hacemos. Nuestra cultura y energía transformadora tienen a la pasión como el motor que nos impulsa a ser mejores y a conquistar nuevos desafíos. Trabajamos con el disfrute de hacer juntos lo imposible. Descripción del empleo Estamos buscando un Checker orientado al detalle para unirse a nuestro equipo en Guayaquil, Ecuador. En este puesto, será responsable de verificar la calidad del producto, mantener registros precisos de inventario y garantizar el cumplimiento de las normas y procedimientos de la organización. Verificar la exactitud de la cantidad y los estándares de calidad de los productos entrantes y salientes. Realizar comprobaciones sistemáticas del inventario y mantener una documentación detallada Operar los sistemas de gestión de inventarios para seguir el movimiento de los productos Garantizar una rotación adecuada de los productos siguiendo los principios FIFO (primero en entrar, primero en salir) Supervise y documente los procesos de control de calidad Verifique la exactitud de la documentación de envío y recepción Inspeccionar el envasado y las condiciones del producto para mantener los estándares de calidad Informe de las discrepancias y mantenga registros precisos de cualquier variación Coordinarse con el personal del almacén para garantizar la correcta manipulación del inventario Implantar y mantener los procedimientos de control de calidad Supervisar el cumplimiento de las normas operativas y de seguridad Cumplir el 100 % de entregas planificadas a las agencias a nivel país y Mercados Especiales en tiempo (Meta TMA) y cantidad Requisitos Ingeniero/Licenciatura en Administración de Empresas o campo relacionado, Logístico Dominio de Excel y de los sistemas SAP Experiencia en gestión de inventarios y procedimientos de control de calidad Gran atención al detalle y capacidad analítica Excelente capacidad de organización y documentación Capacidad demostrada para trabajar eficazmente en un entorno de ritmo rápido Resolución de problemas Capacidad para mantener registros precisos y generar informes detallados Capacidad física para realizar inspecciones periódicas Sólidas habilidades de comunicación e interpersonales Conocimiento de los protocolos de seguridad del almacén y de las mejores prácticas Liderazgo de Equipo Horarios Rotarivos Información adicional All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines. La misión de Grupo Mariposa es fomentar el crecimiento y la sostenibilidad dentro de la industria global de alimentos y bebidas. Estamos comprometidos con la excelencia a través de una gestión disciplinada, prácticas innovadoras y una cultura dinámica que acepta el cambio.

empresa: CEO Lawyer Personal Injury Law Firm
descripcion: CEO Lawyer The CEO Lawyer Personal Injury Law Firm is dedicated to educating, empowering, and fighting for victims. With offices across the country, no matter where you are injured, our team of experienced lawyers is here to help you. CEO Lawyer is a rapidly growing personal injury law firm headquartered in downtown Atlanta. We are known for our innovative approach to legal services and our commitment to operational excellence. Our Core Values We are guided by a strong set of values that shape our culture, decisions, and the way we work together: Trust – We build strong relationships through honesty, transparency, and reliability. Humility – We stay open to learning, feedback, and continuous improvement. Ethics – We act with integrity and always do what’s right. Hunger – We are driven, ambitious, and committed to excellence. Education – We value growth, development, and knowledge-sharing. Accountability – We take ownership of our actions and deliver on our commitments. Respect – We treat everyone with professionalism, empathy, and fairness. Teamwork – We collaborate and support each other to achieve shared success. We are seeking a Legal Operations Specialist to support and optimize operations across our U.S.-based personal injury law firm with a global team. This role is ideal for a candidate with a strong legal background, hands-on personal injury experience, and advanced knowledge of Filevine, who also brings a tech-minded and automation-focused mindset. This person will help improve workflows, support legal teams, build scalable processes, contribute to AI and automation initiatives, and strengthen operational excellence across pre-litigation and related legal support functions. En Alpha Builders, buscamos un Project Manager estratégico y orientado a resultados para liderar nuestros próximos desafíos arquitectónicos. Tu misión será comandar la ejecución integral de proyectos de edificación, garantizando la máxima rentabilidad financiera, el cumplimiento de plazos y los más altos estándares de calidad y seguridad. Misión del puesto: Como Project Manager, serás el director de orquesta entre la tecnología BIM y la ejecución en campo. Reportando directamente a la Dirección de Proyectos, liderarás al equipo técnico (Superintendencia, Residentes y BIM) para asegurar que cada metro cuadrado construido cumpla con nuestra promesa de valor. Requisitos: Formación: Ingeniería Civil, Industrial o Arquitectura (Título de 3er nivel). Experiencia Comprobada: Haber liderado como PM al menos 2 proyectos de edificios desde su inicio hasta la entrega final. Mínimo 3 años en Residencia de Obra. Mínimo 2 años en Planificación y 1 año en Control de Costos. Experticia Técnica: Dominio profundo de Curva S y metodologías de control de plazos. Gestión avanzada de presupuestos y análisis de rentabilidad. Experiencia sólida en trámites y gestiones ante entidades municipales y gubernamentales. Sólidos conocimientos en Aseguramiento de Calidad (QA/QC) y Seguridad Industrial. Tecnología: Familiaridad con entornos de trabajo BIM (Revit/Navisworks) y software de planificación (MS Project/Primavera). Responsabilidades clave: Liderar y supervisar directamente al Superintendente de Obra y al equipo BIM. Monitorear el desempeño del proyecto mediante el análisis de la Curva S y toma de acciones preventivas/correctivas. Garantizar la rentabilidad financiera del proyecto mediante un control de costos riguroso. Asegurar la entrega final del activo en condiciones óptimas de habitabilidad. Gestionar indirectamente la cadena de suministros (Compras y Bodega) para garantizar el flujo de materiales.

titulo: Ingeniero de Soporte de Aplicaciones, Trilogy (Remote) - $60,000/year USD
descripcion: The toughest support tickets do not require another person who follows scripts. They require someone capable of stepping into unclear situations, misconfigured systems, conflicting evidence, agitated customers, and AI outputs that lead nowhere—then determining what the actual problem is. This position is designed for the support engineer who thrives on unresolved cases: replicating failures, analyzing logs, tracking API behavior, examining JSON payloads, distinguishing a 401 from a 404 from a 429, and leveraging AI aggressively without accepting its output uncritically. Most support organizations still operate on queues, macros, handoffs, and documented workaround libraries. We are constructing something fundamentally different. Routine support is progressively managed by AI and first-line workflows, meaning human expertise is allocated to the most complex challenges. AI is not replacing you in this context. It is the instrument you control, validate, question, and confirm. This position does not involve copying AI-generated responses, making quick guesses, awaiting direction, or escalating immediately when an issue becomes unfamiliar. It is not suited for someone who specializes deeply in one product and becomes ineffective when the following ticket involves a different technology stack. It is about arriving at the correct answer with the minimum number of customer interactions the problem permits: reproducing issues before proposing solutions, investigating across tickets, Slack channels, knowledge bases, logs, configurations, and tangible evidence before escalating, and composing customer communications that are clear enough to reduce tension. The technical foundation is assumed: REST APIs, JSON, HTTP status codes, command line usage, and log analysis. That foundation is the entry point. Your ability to exercise judgment amid uncertainty is what makes you effective. In this position, your responsibility is to maintain ownership of the issue until it is either resolved or escalated with clarity, accompanied by diagnostic reasoning that is valuable for the subsequent agent and the next AI workflow. You will find this role fulfilling if the ticket that defies logic is the one you prefer most. You will find it unsuitable if you require a single product, a single playbook, and external support to remove obstacles. If that level of pressure improves your performance, please submit your application. What You Will Be Doing AI-Assisted Issue Resolution: Resolve ambiguous, escalated tickets by merging thorough, hands-on troubleshooting with AI that you guide, anchor in verified documentation, and validate. What You Won’t Be Doing Spending two full months onboarding; you will be required to become proficient with multiple products within the first month (we recognize this is demanding) Depending on your managers for assistance; if you are not skilled at removing your own blockers, you will likely find this role difficult Ingeniero De Soporte De Aplicaciones Key Responsibilities Combine technical human judgment and AI tools to provide outstanding customer support, concentrating on complicated issues that AI cannot yet completely address Basic Requirements 2+ years in a practical technical position such as technical support, customer support engineering, software engineering, QA, or sysadmin/DevOps. The job title does not have to be "support." Comfortable constructing and interpreting REST API calls and JSON, understanding HTTP status codes (such as 401 vs 404 and 429 vs 403), and operating in a command line (CLI) and logs. Practical experience using generative AI tools (such as ChatGPT or Claude) in your regular technical work. Professional fluency in English, both written and spoken. Able to work a complete 40-hour week during US business hours (Eastern Time). This is a full US-daytime shift, which means an overnight shift in some time zones. Based in North America, Central America, South America, Australia, New Zealand, the United Kingdom, Ireland, or the Philippines (no relocation support). Nice-to-have Requirements Experience providing support to technical or business customers on enterprise software or B2B SaaS, not only internal IT. API troubleshooting using tools like Postman or curl. A demonstrated history of troubleshooting across multiple unrelated products or tech stacks, not just one. Developer-level proficiency: you can read code or trace an API call when the situation requires it. About Trilogy Hundreds of software businesses run on the Trilogy Business Platform. For three decades, Trilogy has been known for 3 things: Relentlessly seeking top talent, Innovating new technology, and incubating new businesses. Our technological innovation is spearheaded by a passion for simple customer-facing designs. Our incubation of new businesses ranges from entirely new moon-shot ideas to rearchitecting existing projects for today's modern cloud-based stack. Trilogy is a place where you can be surrounded with great people, be proud of doing great work, and grow your career by leaps and bounds. There is so much to cover for this exciting role, and space here is limited. Hit the Apply button if you found this interesting and want to learn more. We look forward to meeting you! Working with us This is a full-time (40 hours per week), long-term position. The position is immediately available and requires entering into an independent contractor agreement with Crossover as a Contractor of Record. The compensation level for this role is $30 USD/hour, which equates to $60,000 USD/year assuming 40 hours per week and 50 weeks per year. The payment period is weekly. Consult www.crossover.com/help-and-faqs for more details on this topic. Crossover Job Code: LJ-3330-EC-COUNTRY-IngenierodeSop1

Description TripleTen is an online teaching platform that empowers people, regardless of their prior experience, to embark on the exciting and challenging journey of mastering tech professions. Our bootcamps focus on training students in Data Analytics, Data Science, Web Development, Quality Assurance (QA) Engineering, and UX/UI Design — in an accessible and practical way, supporting them until they successfully thrive in a new career. 🚀 Our mission is to ensure that every student has the opportunity to successfully master a new profession, find their purpose, and become a valuable member of the tech industry. What is our goal? We are continuously looking for experienced AI Software Engineering professionals who want to support and guide our students on their path to becoming professional developers. This is a full-time teaching role with an expectation of 40 hours per week . The schedule can be flexible, but you must be consistently available to support students throughout their learning journey. How to apply? Apply here. We review applications on a rolling basis and invite selected candidates to record an introductory video where you answer a few questions, and complete a short technical test task. If a vacancy is available, we will assign it to you right away; otherwise, we will keep your profile and completed task on file for future opportunities. 📌 Please submit your CV in English. What You Will Do Host regular live Q&A sessions to help students unblock and progress confidently Offer personalized support through 1:1 video calls to answer questions and guide assignments Occasionally respond to student questions via direct messages Lead live lessons on core program topics and industry-relevant skills Share your professional insights and best practices to support the learning community Review student projects and provide feedback based on program standards Write clear, actionable feedback to help students improve and meet expectations Support students in text by explaining concepts, troubleshooting code, and clarifying project or review questions Requirements 3+ years of work experience as an AI Software Engineer. Expert knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git, React, Webpack, Node.js, and Express.js. Readiness to dedicate 40 hours a week to your students. Participants in bootcamps is an advantage for our candidates. Nice To Have Teaching or tutoring experience. Have your own experience as a student online, and the desire to help create the best place in the world to study AI Software Engineering! What We Can Offer You Flexible & remote collaboration. Training in mentoring and communication techniques. A schedule that’s convenient for you. There isn’t a focus on micromanaging. A comfortable digital office. We use modern digital tools — Miro, Notion, Zoom, etc. — to make working together seamless. A diverse and tight-knit team which is spread out across the US and LatAm, and loves what it does! Growth — our product is growing rapidly, so it’s an excellent time to join us and challenge yourself professionally. Meaningful impact — share your knowledge and support others as they launch new careers in tech. We're excited to get to know you and collaborate! ?

titulo: Ingeniero de Ciberseguridad ITSA (Hibrido Quito)(Exp en Banca) K526
descripcion: Keppri Busca Product Owner (PO) – Experto Funcional con experiencia en Banca En Keppri, los seres humanos son el núcleo de nuestro desarrollo tecnológico. Somos una consultora enfocada en todo el ciclo de productos digitales, con amplia experiencia en los sectores financiero e inmobiliario. Si buscas un entorno donde el desarrollo personal y profesional es una prioridad, esta oportunidad es para ti. Tu Rol Experto Funcional Bancario - Product Owner (PO) Serás responsable de liderar la definición funcional y la evolución de productos digitales para un cliente del sector bancario. Actuarás como puente entre negocio y tecnología, asegurando que el equipo entregue valor continuo mediante una gestión clara del backlog , criterios de aceptación bien definidos y una visión alineada con objetivos del negocio, cumplimiento y experiencia del cliente. Responsabilidades clave Gestión de producto y valor Levantar y traducir necesidades del negocio en épicas, features y user stories claras y accionables. Priorizar el backlog con foco en valor, riesgo, dependencias y cumplimiento normativo. Definir objetivos, roadmap y alcance por releases junto a stakeholders. Definición funcional y calidad Elaborar requerimientos funcionales (flujos, reglas de negocio, excepciones) y criterios de aceptación. Asegurar consistencia del producto: journeys, casos borde, reglas transaccionales, mensajes al usuario. Validar entregables con negocio (UAT), asegurar trazabilidad y apoyar al equipo QA. Trabajo con stakeholders Facilitar workshops con áreas bancarias (canales, operaciones, riesgo, cumplimiento, tecnología). Gestionar expectativas, dependencias y decisiones, comunicando avances y riesgos de forma oportuna. Trabajo ágil Participar activamente en ceremonias ágiles (refinamiento, planning, daily, review, retrospectiva). Apoyar al equipo de desarrollo resolviendo dudas funcionales y manteniendo el alcance claro. Competencias Clave +5 años de experiencia como Product Owner, Analista Funcional Senior, Business Analyst o roles afines en productos digitales. Experiencia comprobada en sector bancario, idealmente en productos como: Cuentas, transferencias, pagos, tarjetas, créditos, onboarding, autenticación/autorización, core banking, conciliaciones. Dominio de prácticas ágiles: Gestión de backlog, priorización, definición de historias, criterios de aceptación, DoR/DoD. Capacidad de modelar procesos y reglas: BPMN (deseable), mapeo de procesos, documentación funcional, manejo de excepciones. Habilidad para negociar y alinear múltiples stakeholders, con comunicación clara y enfoque en resultados. Enfoque en calidad y control: trazabilidad de requerimientos, pruebas funcionales, UAT, gestión de cambios. Deseables (no excluyentes) Conocimiento de marcos/regulación y temas transversales: KYC, AML, SARLAFT, seguridad, privacidad, auditoría. Conocimiento de APIs e integración (entendimiento funcional de contratos, eventos, procesos). Experiencia en canales digitales (web/mobile) y mejora de journeys. Certificaciones: PSPO / CSPO / Scrum (deseable). Experiencia con herramientas: Jira, Confluence, Miro, Figma (lectura funcional), Azure DevOps. Lo que ofrecemos Salario competitivo acorde a tu experiencia. Desarrollo profesional: apoyo para formación continua y certificaciones. Bonificaciones por desempeño. Un ambiente centrado en tu crecimiento humano y profesional. Proyectos retadores con impacto real en banca y transformación digital. Si te apasiona liderar producto desde lo funcional, alinear negocio con tecnología y entregar valor continuo en el sector bancario, ¡únete a Keppri!

At BairesDev®, we've been leading the way in technology projects for over 15 years. We deliver cutting-edge solutions to giants like Google and the most innovative startups in Silicon Valley. Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide. When you apply for this position, you're taking the first step in a process that goes beyond the ordinary. We aim to align your passions and skills with our vacancies, setting you on a path to exceptional career development and success. Staffing Solution Architect at BairesDev As a Staffing Solution Architect, you will be responsible for overseeing the definition of the skills required by the client for staffing augmentation purposes and ensuring that we are aligned with them in sourcing the people they need for their projects. This is a great opportunity for a professional looking to develop with one of the fastest-growing companies in the industry. Apply now and become part of a global team where your unique talents can truly thrive!
